name: 平台跳跃
description: 横版平台跳跃游戏，玩家控制角色在平台间跳跃，收集道具并躲避敌人
prompt_guide:
## PLATFORMER-SPECIFIC GUIDANCE
- Player character with gravity, jumping, and horizontal movement (WASD/arrows + space)
- Platforms at varied heights, collectible items, and enemies
- Parallax background scrolling for visual depth
- Level-complete flag/door
- Health system with visual feedback
## Available Assets
- `assets/placeholder.png` — 1×1 placeholder image only; no bundled sprites or audio. The game renders entirely via Canvas 2D drawing — AI should generate all visual/audio content programmatically or reference external CDN assets

example.title: 猫咪云朵冒险
example.prompt: 一个平台跳跃游戏，主角是猫咪，在云朵之间跳跃收集星星，躲避小鸟敌人。有计分和游戏结束画面。
